color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Demand and Planning
Supplier / Admin configures pricing, catalog, zones, factories, warehouses
Retailer browses suppliers, builds cart, and places order
Warehouse Admin watches stock and raises supply request

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fulfillment Execution
Factory Admin accepts request, produces stock, and plans transfer
Payload / Payloader loads truck, injects changes, seals or flags manifest
Driver executes route and Retailer confirms goods and payment

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Platform Backbone
APIs, Spanner, Redis, Kafka, AI, notifications keep the flow consistent

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Realtime Hubs
retailer, driver, payload, warehouse, fleet updates stay live across surfaces

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Control and Feedback
Supplier / Admin reviews dashboard, CRM, analytics, finance
Warehouse Admin receives transfer or records shortage and exceptions

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Exception Paths
Stockout or forecast breach
Manifest mismatch or loading exception
Payment issue or shop-closed stop
Supplier / Admin applies overrides, returns, and manual resolution

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Loop closes:
analytics, replenishment,
next order cycle
